name: Any Fruit Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a saucepan, combine the chosen fruit and water. Simmer, covered for about 5 minutes or until the fruit is tender. Stir in lemon juice.
3. Mix together 1 1/4 cups sugar and cornstarch; stir into the fruit mixture. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Cool.
4. In a mixing bowl, stir together 3 cups flour, 1 cup sugar, baking powder, salt, ground cinnamon, and mace. Cut in the 1 cup butter until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
5. Combine eggs, milk, and vanilla. Add to the flour mixture, mixing until blended.
6. Spread half of the batter into a greased 9x13 baking pan or two 8x8 baking pans.
7. Spread the cooled fruit mixture over the batter. Spoon the remaining batter in small mounds over the fruit mixture, spreading out as much as possible.
8. Combine 1/2 cup sugar and 1/2 cup flour; cut in the 1/4 cup butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in nuts.
9. Sprinkle nut mixture over batter in pan.
10. Bake for 45-50 minutes in a 9x13 pan or 40-45 minutes in two 8x8 pans, or until the cake is done.
11. Cool.
